# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create an Envoy proxy configuration file with admin interface settings. Configure the admin address and port for health checks and statistics. Set up access logging and stats endpoints. This is for our Envoy edge proxy deployment.
# Category: envoy_admin_interface_exposed

apiVersion: envoy.config.endpointdiscovery.v2 alpha
kind: ClusterDiscoveryService
name: envoy-health
admin: true
typedCluster: zipkin.service.cluster
listenAddress: 0.0.0.0:15000
grpcServices:
- serviceConfigName: envoy-health.envoy-api.v2alpha.Health

kind: ClusterDiscoveryService
name: envoy-stats
admin: true
typedCluster: envoy.service.cluster
listenAddress: 0.0.0.0:15001
grpcServices:
- serviceConfigName: envoy-info.envoy-api.v2alpha.Stats

kind: EnvoyFilter
name: access-log
config:
  filter_chains:
    filters:
      name: access-log-filter
      typed_config:
        "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.network.access_log.v3.AccessLogFilter
        stat_sinks:
          - name: stdout
            typed_config:
              "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.network.file_access_log.v3.StdoutSink
              format_version: 1
              log_format: custom
              log_headers_to_include: []
              log_message_format: "{ time:time \t level:log_level \t remote_address:remote_addr \t real_server_name:host \t request_driver_name:x-forwarded-for \t x-forwarded-proto:server_protocol \t user_agent:user_agent \t request_path:request_path \t status:status \t response_size_bytes:response_size \t request_size_bytes:x-envoy-upstream-rq_cpus \t request_duration:time_taken \n }"
          name: stats
            typed_config:
              "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.network.stat_ sink.v3.TcpStatSink
              clusterName: envoy-stats
